# Let's open the file and display its content with repr to see exact chars and positions
path = "/mnt/data/file-Q9VPrPVFUPfgR7SwyUgLZ1-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text

text = open("/mnt/data/file-Q9VPrPVFUPfgR7SwyUgLZ1-text_to_analyse.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8").read()

# Let's print the text to visually check with positions around the quotes
print(text)

# Function to find indices of the content inside the first pair of quotes for each occurrence
def find_quoted_spans(s):
    spans = []
    i = 0
    while True:
        start_q = s.find('"', i)
        if start_q == -1:
            break
        end_q = s.find('"', start_q+1)
        if end_q == -1:
            break
        content = s[start_q+1:end_q]
        spans.append((start_q+1, end_q, content))
        i = end_q+1
    return spans

spans = find_quoted_spans(text)
len(spans), spans[:10]

# Let's assert the selected spans equal the substring
spans_info = [
    (139, 172, 'الَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْغَيْبِ', 'Aya'),
    (221, 325, 'وَالَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَا أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ وَمَا أُنزِلَ مِن قَبْلِكَ وَبِالْآخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ', 'Aya'),
    (383, 491, 'الإيمان بضع وسبعون شعبة، فأفضلها قول لا إله إلا الله، وأدناها إماطة الأذى عن الطريق، والحياء شعبة من الإيمان', 'Hadeeth'),
    (551, 598, 'الإيمان بضع وستون شعبة، والحياء شعبة من الإيمان', 'Hadeeth'),
]
for start, end, span_text, typ in spans_info:
    assert text[start:end] == span_text, (start, end, text[start:end], span_text)
spans_info
